message:
Add contribute page for prompt submissions

New /contribute route with a form-based interface for creating prompt
submissions without needing an account or database access:

Form features:
- Title with auto-generated kebab-case ID
- Category selection from registry categories
- Comma-separated tag input
- Author and optional Twitter handle
- Multi-line prompt content with template literal escaping
- When-to-use and tips fields (one per line)

Output:
- Live TypeScript entry preview
- Copy buttons for entry and issue body
- Direct links to create GitHub issue or PR
- Contribution checklist with best practices

Security:
- SAFE_ID_PATTERN validation for prompt IDs
- Template literal escaping for prompt content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
